rationale: Gov't Code §2001.093 governs discovery of prior statements in contested case proceedings. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: On request, a person, including a person who is not a party, is entitled to obtain a copy of a statement in a party's possession, custody, or control that the person has previously made about the contested case or its subject matter.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this administrative discovery provision.
